NT News
Showing 0 regulators

State-gov priorities

Cited strategic priorities across all 9 jurisdictions, refreshed bi-annually. Every source URL is .gov.au.

Cross-jurisdiction patterns synthesis will populate on the next AI-enabled refresh.

Last refreshed 2026-04-22. Bi-annual schedule; source URLs verified to .gov.au.

Commonwealth

  • Future Made in Australia
    The Treasury / Department of Industry, Science and Resources 2024-2034 (10-year, $22.7B package)
    Program design, sector assessment frameworks, investment mandate design, industry consultation, economic modelling, community benefit evaluation
    Source (2024-05-14)
  • Strengthening Medicare
    Department of Health, Disability and Ageing 2023-2027 (reform rolling); Budget 2025-26 expansion from Nov 2025
    Primary care reform evaluation, Urgent Care Clinic rollout support, workforce modelling, digital health implementation, Medicare integrity assurance
    Source (2024-05-14)
  • 2024 National Defence Strategy and Integrated Investment Program
    Department of Defence 2024-2034 ($330B Integrated Investment Program to 2033-34)
    Capability program assurance, workforce strategy, sovereign industrial capability priorities, AUKUS implementation support, capability reviews
    Source (2024-04-17)
  • APS Reform Agenda
    Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet / Australian Public Service Commission 2022-ongoing (4 pillars, 59 initiatives; Public Service Amendment Act 2024 enacted)
    Integrity and capability reviews, workforce strategy, stewardship framework design, data & digital workforce planning, contractor-to-APS conversion support
    Source (2024-12-01)
  • Working for Women: A Strategy for Gender Equality
    Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet (Office for Women) 2024-2034 (10-year strategy)
    Gender impact analysis, workplace gender equality evaluation, Government Board appointment strategy support, pay-gap economic modelling, consultation design
    Source (2024-03-07)
  • Aged Care reform – transition to Support at Home
    Department of Health, Disability and Ageing Aged Care Act 2024 commenced 1 Nov 2025; CHSP transition to Support at Home by 1 Jul 2027
    Provider transition support, data and digital strategy implementation, workforce modelling, single assessment system evaluation, consumer journey design
    Source (2024-07-01)

New South Wales

  • Safe Staffing Levels in NSW public hospitals
    NSW Ministry of Health Phase one early 2024; full rollout 2,480 FTE nurses/midwives by June 2027
    Workforce modelling, implementation assurance, change management support, clinical governance advisory, rostering system review
    Source (2024-03-11)
  • Transport Oriented Development Program (TOD)
    Department of Planning, Housing and Infrastructure TOD planning controls commenced 13 May 2024; 15-year horizon; 170,000+ homes
    Precinct planning, inclusionary zoning advisory, infrastructure funding strategy, development feasibility, stakeholder consultation
    Source (2024-05-13)
  • Sydney Metro – Western Sydney Airport and Sydney Metro West
    Transport for NSW / Sydney Metro Western Sydney Airport line opens 2026; Metro West completion by 2032; network to 46 stations by 2030
    Program assurance, capability reviews, cost estimation reviews, land use integration, precinct economic analysis
    Source (2024-06-01)
  • Bringing back manufacturing to NSW (state-owned energy and rollingstock)
    Cabinet Office / Treasury NSW / Transport for NSW 2023-2027+ (current Parliament)
    Industrial strategy advisory, local content analysis, state-owned corporation establishment, procurement strategy, workforce development
    Source (2024-09-01)
  • NSW Budget 2025-26 priorities (essential services + diversified economy)
    NSW Treasury 2025-26 forward estimates to 2028-29
    Fiscal strategy advisory, expenditure review, program evaluation, revenue analysis, investment prioritisation
    Source (2025-06-24)
  • Safer Pathway – domestic and family violence response
    Department of Communities and Justice Statewide rollout ongoing; DFV reforms 2024-ongoing
    Service design, outcomes evaluation, risk assessment framework review, cross-agency data sharing advisory, program logic review
    Source (2024-01-01)

Victoria

  • Victoria's Housing Statement – The Decade Ahead 2024-2034
    Department of Transport and Planning 2024-2034 (800,000 homes / 80,000 per year target)
    Planning reform advisory, activity centre masterplans, affordable housing economics, surplus land unlocking, stakeholder consultation, LGA target negotiations
    Source (2023-09-20)
  • Plan for Victoria (long-term plan to 2051)
    Department of Transport and Planning Released Feb 2025; horizon to 2051 (2.24 million homes target)
    LGA housing target analysis, settlement pattern modelling, sustainability and climate policy integration, First Peoples self-determination in planning, infrastructure sequencing
    Source (2025-02-01)
  • Mental Health and Wellbeing reform (Royal Commission implementation)
    Department of Health 2021-2031 (decade of reform); Statewide Service and Capital Plan 2024-2037
    Service design, capital planning, workforce strategy, outcomes evaluation, lived experience engagement design, Mental Health Levy economic analysis
    Source (2024-07-01)
  • Treaty for Victoria / First Peoples' self-determination
    First Peoples – State Relations Statewide Treaty Bill 2025 introduced; negotiations ongoing
    Closing the Gap accountability framework design, service commissioning transition, policy impact analysis, governance advisory for new representative body
    Source (2025-02-01)
  • Breakthrough Victoria Fund – research and innovation commercialisation
    Department of Jobs, Skills, Industry and Regions 2020-2030 ($2B 10-year fund; $1.3B co-investment leveraged by 2024)
    Commercialisation strategy, innovation ecosystem review, investment thesis advisory, co-investment deal structuring, industry sector analysis
    Source (2024-06-30)

Queensland

  • Making Queensland Safer – adult crime, adult time youth justice reform
    Department of Youth Justice and Victim Support (renamed 1 Nov 2024) Making Queensland Safer Act 2024 assented 13 Dec 2024; Queensland Youth Justice Strategy 2024-2028
    Program logic review, early intervention evaluation, victim advocacy service design, circuit breaker sentencing assurance, regional reset program evaluation
    Source (2024-08-01)
  • Homes for Queenslanders housing plan
    Department of Housing and Public Works 2024-2046 (1 million new homes by 2046; 53,500 social homes)
    Housing target modelling, modular housing economics, social housing procurement, church/charity land strategy, planning reform advisory
    Source (2024-02-14)
  • A Fresh Start – cost-of-living and tax relief
    Queensland Treasury 100 Day Plan completed early 2025; ongoing measures 2024-2028
    Revenue impact modelling, cost-of-living measure evaluation, payroll tax analysis, first home buyer stamp duty modelling
    Source (2025-02-01)
  • Queensland Resources Industry Development Plan (QRIDP)
    Department of Natural Resources and Mines, Manufacturing and Regional and Rural Development 2022-2052 (30-year vision; living document)
    Critical minerals strategy, decarbonisation roadmaps, regional community transition planning, ESG performance frameworks, royalty policy analysis
    Source (2024-10-01)
  • Bruce Highway Advisory Council and regional infrastructure
    Department of Transport and Main Roads Re-established 100 Day Plan period (late 2024); ongoing through current term
    Regional corridor prioritisation, cost-benefit analysis, safety-focused project business cases, stakeholder engagement with regional councils
    Source (2024-11-30)
  • Department of the Premier and Cabinet Strategic Plan 2024-2028
    Department of the Premier and Cabinet (Queensland) 2024-2028 (current through 30 April 2025 review; superseded by 2025-2029 plan)
    Central agency capability review, Cabinet support modernisation, policy quality uplift, intergovernmental strategy, corporate excellence frameworks
    Source (2024-06-28)

  • WA Government Priorities 2025-2029 (Jobs, Health, Housing, Community, Environment, Infrastructure and Services)
    Department of the Premier and Cabinet (WA) 2025-2029 (current parliamentary term)
    Cross-agency delivery coordination, outcomes-based budgeting advisory, capability reviews for new departments, program assurance
    Source (2025-03-01)
  • Made in WA Plan – $1B Strategic Industries Fund
    Department of Jobs, Tourism, Science and Innovation 2025-2035 ($500M additional investment; SIF total $1B over 10 years)
    Industrial policy advisory, biomedical precinct economics, battery manufacturing supply chain, EV bus and ferry procurement, screen industry strategy
    Source (2025-05-08)
  • Defence West: WA Defence and Defence Industry Strategy 2025
    Department of Jobs, Tourism, Science and Innovation / Defence West 2025-2040 (15-year strategic vision)
    AUKUS readiness, continuous naval shipbuilding industrial strategy, defence workforce planning, supplier diversification, sovereign capability analysis
    Source (2025-02-01)
  • Diversify WA: 2024 Update (economic development framework)
    Department of Jobs, Tourism, Science and Innovation Launched 2019; updated 2024; nine external-facing sectors
    Sector prioritisation, investment attraction strategy, comparative advantage analysis, export market development, regulatory environment review
    Source (2024-09-01)
  • State Infrastructure Strategy (Infrastructure WA)
    Infrastructure WA 20-year strategy; IWA Annual Report and Government Response
    Infrastructure business case review, prioritisation methodology, capital program assurance, decarbonisation of infrastructure, asset recycling analysis
    Source (2024-01-01)

  • State Prosperity Project
    Department of the Premier and Cabinet (SA) / Department for Energy and Mining Announced 2023; long-term (renewables, critical minerals, green manufacturing)
    Critical minerals strategy, green steel economics, Northern Water business case, green industrial precinct design, trade and investment attraction
    Source (2023-09-01)
  • South Australia's Net Zero Strategy 2024-2030
    Department for Environment and Water / Department for Energy and Mining 2024-2030 (100% net renewable electricity by 2027; net zero by 2050)

  • Hydrogen Jobs Plan and South Australia's Hydrogen Action Plan
    Office of Hydrogen Power South Australia (OHPSA) $593M green hydrogen power facility; world-leading hydrogen facilities 2026; 20 actions across 5 themes

  • 20-Year State Infrastructure Strategy
    Infrastructure SA 20-year horizon; update cycles every 5 years
    Business case assurance, infrastructure prioritisation methodology, asset management strategy, capital program reviews
    Source (2024-01-01)

  • 2030 Strong Plan for Tasmania's Future
    Department of Premier and Cabinet (Tasmania) 2024-2030 (delivered via 2024-25 Budget and onwards)
    Whole-of-government program delivery assurance, cross-cutting priorities alignment, strategic investment review, outcome reporting frameworks

  • Long-Term Plan for Healthcare in Tasmania 2040 / Our Healthcare Future
    Department of Health (Tasmania) 2040 horizon; Our Healthcare Future released December 2022 with 6 action areas
    Primary/acute balance modelling, workforce strategy (especially rural/regional), integrated care pathways, digital health roadmap, demand modelling

  • Tasmanian Renewable Energy Target – 200% by 2040
    Department of State Growth / ReCFIT (Renewables, Climate and Future Industries Tasmania) 2020-2040 (200% renewable generation; Bell Bay green hydrogen hub by 2030)
    REZ business case support, Renewable Energy Approvals Pathway (REAP) process design, green hydrogen offtake analysis, transmission strategy, workforce planning

  • Tasmanian Housing Strategy – 10,000 affordable homes by 2032

  • Tasmanian Tourism Strategy – 1.6M interstate + 400K international visitors by 2030
    Department of State Growth / Tourism Tasmania 2024-2030 (target: $5.6B visitor spend)

  • Parliamentary and Governing Agreement for the 10th ACT Legislative Assembly

    Whole-of-government priority alignment, directorate capability reviews, outcome-based reporting framework design, reform program assurance

    Environment, Planning and Sustainable Development Directorate New Climate Strategy 2026-2035 under development; Active Travel Plan 2024-2030; net zero emissions by 2045
    Emissions reduction pathways, transport decarbonisation, gas phase-out strategy, just transition planning, EV fleet procurement

  • Rebuilding the Economy: Northern Territory Economic Strategy 2025
    Department of the Chief Minister and Cabinet (NT) / Office of the Territory Coordinator 2025-2028 (5 strategic priorities; 20 strategic initiatives for immediate implementation)
    Major project approvals process design, investment attraction, regional growth prioritisation, Territory workforce strategy, industry sector strategies

  • Reducing Crime: Northern Territory Crime Reduction Strategy 2025
